Bash(node -e "const data = require\('/c/ClaudeCodeProject/akachanlist/.worktrees/akachanlist/src/data/items.json'\); console.log\('JSON is valid'\); console.log\('Categories:', data.categories.length\); console.log\('Total subcategories:', data.categories.reduce\(\(acc, cat\) => acc + cat.subcategories.length, 0\)\); console.log\('Total items:', data.categories.reduce\(\(acc, cat\) => acc + cat.subcategories.reduce\(\(acc2, sub\) => acc2 + sub.items.length, 0\), 0\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/data/items.json', 'utf-8'\)\); console.log\('JSON is valid'\); console.log\('Categories:', data.categories.length\); console.log\('Total subcategories:', data.categories.reduce\(\(acc, cat\) => acc + cat.subcategories.length, 0\)\); console.log\('Total items:', data.categories.reduce\(\(acc, cat\) => acc + cat.subcategories.reduce\(\(acc2, sub\) => acc2 + sub.items.length, 0\), 0\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = JSON.parse\(fs.readFileSync\('./src/data/items.json', 'utf-8'\)\); data.categories.forEach\(cat => { console.log\('\\\\n=== ' + cat.title + ' ==='\); cat.subcategories.forEach\(sub => { console.log\('  - ' + sub.title + ': ' + sub.items.length + ' items'\); }\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const data = require\('./src/data/items.json'\); console.log\('✓ Valid JSON'\); console.log\('Categories:', data.categories.length\); console.log\('Total items:', data.categories.reduce\(\(sum, cat\) => sum + cat.subcategories.reduce\(\(s, sub\) => s + sub.items.length, 0\), 0\)\);")
